summary: Major UI improvements across both admin panel and Flutter app. Admin panel: driver_list redesigned with tab bar inside a single card, approved/rejected tabs now use a full table with hover-reveal action buttons (eye/route/delete), pending tab uses large approval cards with gradient avatars, detail modal shows full driver info, sidebar now shows animated pending badge from context_processor. Flutter app: HomeScreen upgraded with auto-refresh timer (30s), WidgetsBindingObserver for app-resume refresh, skeleton loading cards with fade animation, improved duty banner with AnimatedSwitcher and AnimatedContainer, online indicator badge, IndexedStack for tab persistence, richer snackbars with icons and haptic feedback, order count badge. OrderCard redesigned with route container, colored status dot, cancel button as icon-only, improved shadows. LoginScreen fully redesigned with gradient background, entry animation (FadeTransition + SlideTransition), haptic feedback, better input decoration. New SkeletonCard widget added.
current_status: Both admin panel (Django) and Flutter driver app are improved with 0 errors. Flutter analyze passes clean. Django check passes clean.
